query:
SELECT
                message_id,
                emoji,
                COALESCE(COUNT(*)::BIGINT, 0) as "count!",
                BOOL_OR(user_id = $2) as "reacted_by_me!"
            FROM message_reactions
            WHERE message_id = ANY($1::uuid[])
            GROUP BY message_id, emoji
            ORDER BY message_id, MIN(created_at)
